metadata.description: AI-powered tools for developers, marketing, and operations by Somnio Software.

plugins.name: somnio-development
plugins.description: AI-powered project health audits, security audits, and best practices validation for Flutter, NestJS, and more.

plugins.name: somnio-marketing
plugins.description: AI-powered marketing tools — content strategy, ASO audits, and campaign analysis.

plugins.name: somnio-operations
plugins.description: Define user stories, manage backlogs, and streamline project workflows. Connect to Jira, Linear, or Slack to turn ideas into actionable tickets.

plugins.name: somnio-engineering-management
plugins.description: AI-powered engineering management tools — performance reviews, HandShake acknowledgement generation, and career path evaluation.
